mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GAME ( GAME_IDX, LEAGUE_IDX, AWAY_IDX, HOME_IDX, GAME_DATE, GAME_TIME, GAME_FIELD, GAME_STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_GAME.NEXTVAL, #{league_idx}, (SELECT TEAM_IDX FROM TEAM WHERE TEAM_NAME = #{home_name}), (SELECT TEAM_IDX FROM TEAM WHERE TEAM_NAME = #{away_name}), #{game_date}, #{game_time}, #{game_field}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT GAME_IDX, LEAGUE_IDX, AWAY_IDX, HOME_IDX, GAME_DATE, GAME_TIME, GAME_FIELD, GAME_STATUS, WINNER, WIN_PITCHER, LOSE_PITCHER, SAVE_PITCHER, HOLD_PITCHER FROM GAME WHERE GAME_IDX = #{game_idx}
SELECT LEAGUE_NAME FROM LEAGUE WHERE LEAGUE_IDX = #{league_idx}

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 1 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i1", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 2 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i2", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 3 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i3", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 4 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i4", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 5 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i5", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 6 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i6", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 7 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i7", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 8 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i8", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 9 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i9", NVL(SUM(GET_SCORE), 0) AS "r", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "h", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'BB' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "b" FROM GAME_RESULT WHERE GAME_IDX = #{game_idx} AND TOP_BOTTOM = 'T'

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 1 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i1", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 2 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i2", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 3 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i3", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 4 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i4", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 5 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i5", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 6 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i6", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 7 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i7", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 8 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i8", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN INNING = 9 THEN GET_SCORE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "i9", NVL(SUM(GET_SCORE), 0) AS "r", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "h", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'BB' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "b" FROM GAME_RESULT WHERE GAME_IDX = #{game_idx} AND TOP_BOTTOM = 'B'

SELECT AWAY.TEAM_NAME AS "away_name", HOME.TEAM_NAME AS "home_name" FROM GAME G LEFT JOIN TEAM AWAY ON G.AWAY_IDX = AWAY.TEAM_IDX LEFT JOIN TEAM HOME ON G.HOME_IDX = HOME.TEAM_IDX WHERE G.GAME_IDX = #{game_idx}

SELECT HITTER_NUM AS "hitter_num", HITTER_NAME AS "hitter_name", SUM( CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR', 'K', 'OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "at_bat", NVL(SUM(GET_SCORE), 0) AS "score", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "hit", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'HR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "hr", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'SAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "sac", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'BB' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "bb", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'K' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "k", TO_CHAR( NVL( SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR', 'K', 'OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ), 'FM0.000' ) AS "avg" FROM GAME_RESULT WHERE GAME_IDX = #{game_idx} AND TOP_BOTTOM = 'T' AND HITTER_NUM != 0 GROUP BY HITTER_NUM, HITTER_NAME ORDER BY HITTER_NUM

SELECT HITTER_NUM AS "hitter_num", HITTER_NAME AS "hitter_name", SUM( CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR', 'K', 'OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "at_bat", NVL(SUM(GET_SCORE), 0) AS "score", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "hit", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'HR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "hr", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'SAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "sac", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'BB' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "bb", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'K' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "k", TO_CHAR( NVL( SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR', 'K', 'OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ), 'FM0.000' ) AS "avg" FROM GAME_RESULT WHERE GAME_IDX = #{game_idx} AND TOP_BOTTOM = 'B' AND HITTER_NUM != 0 GROUP BY HITTER_NUM, HITTER_NAME ORDER BY HITTER_NUM

SELECT p.PITCHER_ID, p.PITCHER_NAME, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN p.OUT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 WHEN MOD(p.OUT_CNT, 3) = 0 THEN FLOOR(p.OUT_CNT / 3) WHEN MOD(p.OUT_CNT, 3) = 1 THEN FLOOR(p.OUT_CNT / 3) + 0.3 WHEN MOD(p.OUT_CNT, 3) = 2 THEN FLOOR(p.OUT_CNT / 3) + 0.6 END ), 0) AS INNINGS, SUM(p.HIT_CNT) AS HIT_CNT, SUM(p.RUN_CNT) AS RUN_CNT, SUM(p.ERA_CNT) AS ERA_CNT, SUM(p.BB_CNT) AS BB_CNT, SUM(p.K_CNT) AS K_CNT, SUM(p.HR_CNT) AS HR_CNT, SUM(p.BATTER_CNT) AS BATTER_CNT, SUM(p.AT_BAT_CNT) AS AT_BAT_CNT FROM ( SELECT PITCHER_ID, PITCHER_NAME, INNING, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('OUT', 'SAC', 'K') THEN 1 END) AS OUT_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR') THEN 1 END) AS HIT_CNT, SUM(GET_SCORE) AS RUN_CNT, SUM(ERA) AS ERA_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'BB' THEN 1 END) AS BB_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'K' THEN 1 END) AS K_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'HR' THEN 1 END) AS HR_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT != 'ETC' THEN 1 END) AS BATTER_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT != 'ETC' AND RESULT != 'BB' AND RESULT != 'SAC' THEN 1 END) AS AT_BAT_CNT FROM GAME_RESULT WHERE GAME_IDX = #{game_idx} AND TOP_BOTTOM = 'B' GROUP BY PITCHER_ID, PITCHER_NAME, INNING ) p GROUP BY p.PITCHER_ID, p.PITCHER_NAME ORDER BY p.PITCHER_NAME

SELECT p.PITCHER_ID, p.PITCHER_NAME, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN p.OUT_CNT = 0 THEN 0 WHEN MOD(p.OUT_CNT, 3) = 0 THEN FLOOR(p.OUT_CNT / 3) WHEN MOD(p.OUT_CNT, 3) = 1 THEN FLOOR(p.OUT_CNT / 3) + 0.3 WHEN MOD(p.OUT_CNT, 3) = 2 THEN FLOOR(p.OUT_CNT / 3) + 0.6 END ), 0) AS INNINGS, SUM(p.HIT_CNT) AS HIT_CNT, SUM(p.RUN_CNT) AS RUN_CNT, SUM(p.ERA_CNT) AS ERA_CNT, SUM(p.BB_CNT) AS BB_CNT, SUM(p.K_CNT) AS K_CNT, SUM(p.HR_CNT) AS HR_CNT, SUM(p.BATTER_CNT) AS BATTER_CNT, SUM(p.AT_BAT_CNT) AS AT_BAT_CNT FROM ( SELECT PITCHER_ID, PITCHER_NAME, INNING, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('OUT', 'SAC', 'K') THEN 1 END) AS OUT_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT IN ('1B', '2B', '3B', 'HR') THEN 1 END) AS HIT_CNT, SUM(GET_SCORE) AS RUN_CNT, SUM(ERA) AS ERA_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'BB' THEN 1 END) AS BB_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'K' THEN 1 END) AS K_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT = 'HR' THEN 1 END) AS HR_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT != 'ETC' THEN 1 END) AS BATTER_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN RESULT != 'ETC' AND RESULT != 'BB' AND RESULT != 'SAC' THEN 1 END) AS AT_BAT_CNT FROM GAME_RESULT WHERE GAME_IDX = #{game_idx} AND TOP_BOTTOM = 'T' GROUP BY PITCHER_ID, PITCHER_NAME, INNING ) p GROUP BY p.PITCHER_ID, p.PITCHER_NAME ORDER BY p.PITCHER_NAME
mapper.update: UPDATE GAME SET WINNER = #{winner}, WIN_PITCHER = #{win_pitcher}, LOSE_PITCHER = #{lose_pitcher}, SAVE_PITCHER = #{save_pitcher}, HOLD_PITCHER = #{hold_pitcher} WHERE GAME_IDX = #{game_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT GAME_IDX, LEAGUE_IDX, AWAY_IDX, HOME_IDX, GAME_DATE, GAME_TIME, GAME_FIELD, GAME_STATUS, WINNER, WIN_PITCHER, LOSE_PITCHER, SAVE_PITCHER, HOLD_PITCHER FROM GAME WHERE GAME_IDX = #{game_idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GAME_RESULT ( RECORD_NUM, GAME_IDX, INNING, TOP_BOTTOM, HITTER_NUM, HITTER_NAME, HITTER_ID, PITCHER_NAME, PITCHER_ID, RESULT, GET_SCORE, ERA, CONTENT ) VALUES ( SEQ_RECORD.NEXTVAL, #{param2}, #{param1.inning}, #{param1.top_bottom}, #{param1.hitter_num}, TRIM(#{param1.hitter_name}), TRIM(#{param1.hitter_id}), TRIM(#{param1.pitcher_name}), TRIM(#{param1.pitcher_id}), #{param1.result}, #{param1.get_score}, #{param1.era}, #{param1.content} )
mapper.select: SELECT RECORD_NUM AS record_num, GAME_IDX AS game_idx, INNING AS inning, TOP_BOTTOM AS top_bottom, HITTER_NUM AS hitter_num, HITTER_NAME AS hitter_name, HITTER_ID AS hitter_id, PITCHER_NAME AS pitcher_name, PITCHER_ID AS pitcher_id, RESULT AS result, GET_SCORE AS get_score, ERA AS era, CONTENT AS content FROM GAME_RESULT WHERE GAME_IDX = #{game_idx} ORDER BY INNING, CASE TOP_BOTTOM WHEN 'T' THEN 1 WHEN 'B' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, RECORD_NUM
